summary: Researched Python project setup for BimodalHarness: hatchling build backend, src/bimodal_harness layout, PyTorch 2.12 + z3-solver 4.16 + lean-interact 0.11, dependency groups (core/dev/gpu/lean), ruff + mypy configuration, GitHub Actions CI with GPU-skip markers, pre-commit hooks.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive pyproject.toml setup, directory layout, dependency versions, CI/CD design, ruff/mypy config for ML training harness
